messages.content: {"intent": "general", "title": "What is NMIMS?", "subtitle": null, "sections": [{"heading": null, "type": "paragraph", "content": "Narsee Monjee Institute of Management Studies (NMIMS) was founded in 1981 under the aegis of the Vile Parle Kelavani Mandal (VPKM). It is a multi-disciplinary, multi-campus deemed-to-be university with a national and international presence. NMIMS was granted deemed university status in 2003 and is accredited with the highest grade of A++ by NAAC."}], "footer": null, "confidence": "high", "fallback": null}
